ministry: Ministry of Finance / Department of Financial Services
benefit: Zero-balance savings account + RuPay debit card + ₹2L accidental death insurance + ₹30,000 life cover + ₹10,000 overdraft facility (after 6 months of satisfactory operation)
notes: PMJDY is the simplest and broadest scheme. Almost universal eligibility. Primary role in the system: prerequisite for nearly every other scheme. Very few exclusions.

conditions.source: PMJDY — minors above 10 years can open account with guardian
conditions.ambiguity_note: Minors 10+ can open with guardian; below 10 requires guardian-operated account

conditions.description: Must not already hold a PMJDY account

conditions.ambiguity_note: Existing zero-balance savings accounts at other banks may already provide PMJDY benefits. The overdraft facility and insurance rider may not apply to pre-existing non-PMJDY zero-balance accounts.

required_documents.document: Aadhaar Card (preferred) OR Voter ID / Driving Licence / NREGA Job Card
required_documents.obtainable_from: Aadhaar Enrollment Centre or state authorities
